title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at 99acres Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the 99acres Asia Pacific Associates family as a Backend Developer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
